zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Driby於1225年之後出生在英國波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特時，他的父親Robert Driby8804歲，母親Andrina of Berkshire8794歲。他於1259年與Alice Fitzhugh Greasley在英國波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年在英國英格蘭波克夏沃可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Driby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Riby (Lincs) or perhaps Ribby (Lancs); on the latter name,  see also  Rigby  . See also   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  .

variants.name: Rigby
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames
meanings: English: locative name  see  Hermitage  . The WR Yorks name is from a hermitage in South Crosland, close to Armitage Bridge (WR Yorks).   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames   notes that the hermitage was built on land granted in a 13th-century charter to the Knights Templar, and that the first known bearer of the surname was Adam del Hermitage of Crosland (1340).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Driby was born after 1225, in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England, his father, Robert Driby, was 8804 and his mother, Andrina of Berkshire, was 8794. He married Alice Fitzhugh Greasley in 1259, in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1289, in Wokefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Dribyが1225年以後にイギリスバークシュアイアストラトフィールド モーティマーで生まれた時，父Robert Dribyは8804歳，母Andrina of Berkshireは8794歳であった。1259年にイギリスバークシュアイアストラトフィールド モーティマーでAlice Fitzhugh Greasleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウオケフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Driby(이)가 1225년 이후 영국 버크실르 스트라트필드 모르팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Driby(은)는 8804세였고, 그의 어머니 Andrina of Berkshire(은)는 8794세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 버크실르 스트라트필드 모르팀어에서 Alice Fitzhugh Greasley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 보케필드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Driby родился после 1225 г. в местности стратфиелд мортимир, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Driby было 8804 года, а матери, которую звали Andrina of Berkshire, 8794. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Fitzhugh Greasley в 1259 г. в местности стратфиелд мортимир, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности вокефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
